children: 8×8 wheeled amphibious APC. A fast road mover for shuttling infantry — thin armour means it is a battle taxi, not a fighting vehicle.

attrs.class: rounded-2xl border-l-4 border-tactical-yellow bg-tactical-yellow/10 p-4 shadow-lg backdrop-blur-md
mb-1 font-mono text-xs font-bold tracking-widest text-tactical-yellow uppercase

children: Do not let it bully you with the KPVT. The hull stops rifle rounds only — a single RPG or sustained .50 cal will brew it up with the whole squad inside.
